changes.before_text: If your command is long running and you would like to be notified when it finishes – simply run your command using `run_in_background`. There is no need to sleep in this case.
changes.after_text: If your command is long running and you would like to be notified when it finishes — use `run_in_background`. No sleep needed.

changes.before_text: Do not retry failing commands in a sleep loop — diagnose the root cause or consider an alternative approach.
changes.after_text: Do not retry failing commands in a sleep loop — diagnose the root cause.
